programme.title: I Died... And Came Back
programme.desc: A nightmare childhood trauma brings death upon a young girl; attempting to understand the abuse she endured as well as her brush with the afterlife leads to unexpected revelations; a mother finds her life's purpose after a fatal car crash.

programme.title: Forgotten Frontlines
programme.desc: The Battle of Castle Itter is the strangest WWII battle the world has never heard of and the only battle where the Allies joined forces with the Germans to defeat the Nazis; high up in the Austrian alps, a castle houses some political prisoners.

programme.title: Castle Secrets
programme.sub-title: Escape from Colditz; Art Asylum; Death not Dishonour
programme.desc: A fairytale chateau provides an unlikely place of refuge; a grand fort in India.

programme.title: Oracles & Prophets
programme.sub-title: Sleeping Prophet, The Pythia, Symbols of Evil
programme.desc: Edgar Cayce makes some accurate predictions; in Ancient Greece, the Oracle of Delphi is the most important prophet; the French occult thinker, Eliphas Lévi, lives in the 19th century.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Science
programme.desc: Blood and soil, for the Nazis, it wasn't just a metaphor; the Nazis would go to any lengths to bend the natural world to their whims; Nazi archaeologists set to work using archaeological finds to assert an ancient Aryan race.

programme.title: Deadly Science
programme.sub-title: Dangerous Heights (Apollo 1, Amelia Earhart, Franz Reichelt)
programme.desc: People who defy earthly forces and dream of high-flying adventures.

programme.title: I Died... And Came Back
programme.desc: A nightmare childhood trauma brings death upon a young girl; attempting to understand the abuse she endured as well as her brush with the afterlife leads to unexpected revelations; a mother finds her life's purpose after a fatal car crash.

programme.title: Forgotten Frontlines
programme.desc: The Battle of Castle Itter is the strangest WWII battle the world has never heard of and the only battle where the Allies joined forces with the Germans to defeat the Nazis; high up in the Austrian alps, a castle houses some political prisoners.

programme.title: Fishing for History
programme.desc: The tale of Japanese Canadian internment camps in the Kootenay region of British Columbia lures Mike and Justin westward; the smallest of items they find leads Toban to a confirmation.

programme.title: Oracles & Prophets
programme.sub-title: Sleeping Prophet, The Pythia, Symbols of Evil
programme.desc: Edgar Cayce makes some accurate predictions; in Ancient Greece, the Oracle of Delphi is the most important prophet; the French occult thinker, Eliphas Lévi, lives in the 19th century.

programme.title: How I Got Here
programme.desc: On a trip to Thailand, Tyler uncovers his mother Diane's vibrant past and her deep culinary roots, while exploring her private connection to Buddhism and bridging the emotional distance left by grief and loss.

programme.title: Nintendo 64 Quest
programme.desc: Rob checks out several booths at Game On Expo in Phoenix and finds some unexpected surprises.

programme.title: Castle Secrets
programme.sub-title: Escape from Colditz; Art Asylum; Death not Dishonour
programme.desc: A fairytale chateau provides an unlikely place of refuge; a grand fort in India.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Science
programme.desc: Blood and soil, for the Nazis, it wasn't just a metaphor; the Nazis would go to any lengths to bend the natural world to their whims; Nazi archaeologists set to work using archaeological finds to assert an ancient Aryan race.

programme.title: Fishing for History
programme.desc: The tale of Japanese Canadian internment camps in the Kootenay region of British Columbia lures Mike and Justin westward; the smallest of items they find leads Toban to a confirmation.

programme.title: Deadly Science
programme.sub-title: Dangerous Heights (Apollo 1, Amelia Earhart, Franz Reichelt)
programme.desc: People who defy earthly forces and dream of high-flying adventures.

programme.title: I Died... And Came Back
programme.desc: A nightmare childhood trauma brings death upon a young girl; attempting to understand the abuse she endured as well as her brush with the afterlife leads to unexpected revelations; a mother finds her life's purpose after a fatal car crash.

programme.title: Forgotten Frontlines
programme.desc: The Battle of Castle Itter is the strangest WWII battle the world has never heard of and the only battle where the Allies joined forces with the Germans to defeat the Nazis; high up in the Austrian alps, a castle houses some political prisoners.

programme.title: Nintendo 64 Quest
programme.desc: Jay visits Game Cycle and is blown away by their huge display of N64 games; but are they willing to wheel and deal at the prices he can afford?

programme.title: Ghosts Off Grid
programme.desc: Jordyn goes on a solo scouting mission to see if Bohemier House, located in a provincial park, merits an official investigation; when the curator Tracey and her daughter join him, messages from beyond ring in loud and clear.

programme.title: Believe
programme.desc: From the intricacies of prayer, to the diversity of Islamic art, and the rich and beautiful traditions of Ramadan and Eid al-Fitr; exploring the vivid picture of how Islam fosters justice, and compassion, through the submission to God.

programme.title: Titans of Defense
programme.desc: When militaries need support in the field, they call upon military machines designed for diverse purposes: from delivering supplies to the battlefield and defusing dangerous minefields, to recovering military vehicles and bridging harrowing gaps.

programme.title: Revolutions That Changed History
programme.desc: Destined to fight and die in servitude, a group of rebel gladiators plot their escape; led to freedom by ex-Roman soldier and master of combat, Spartacus, the rebels emerge on Mount Vesuvius, and a hoard of slaves grows into a rebellion.

programme.title: Mysterious Islands
programme.desc: A volcanic island unveils its dark past; some burials shed light on a powerful ancient egyptian family; marble head is discovered off a Greek island; investigating the sudden disappearance of tagged sharks.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Ancient Dead
programme.desc: The first Emperor of China, Qin Shi Huang, rests in a tomb so large that the archaeological dig could last a century; researchers discover that the oldest of the Chinchorro mummies are children.

programme.title: How I Got Here
programme.sub-title: Ghana: That Name That You Live
programme.desc: Doris takes her daughter, Shetin, to Ghana to learn the truth behind her royal bloodline.

programme.title: Ghosts Off Grid
programme.desc: Jordyn goes on a solo scouting mission to see if Bohemier House, located in a provincial park, merits an official investigation; when the curator Tracey and her daughter join him, messages from beyond ring in loud and clear.

programme.title: Believe
programme.desc: From the intricacies of prayer, to the diversity of Islamic art, and the rich and beautiful traditions of Ramadan and Eid al-Fitr; exploring the vivid picture of how Islam fosters justice, and compassion, through the submission to God.

programme.title: Titans of Defense
programme.desc: When militaries need support in the field, they call upon military machines designed for diverse purposes: from delivering supplies to the battlefield and defusing dangerous minefields, to recovering military vehicles and bridging harrowing gaps.

programme.title: Revolutions That Changed History
programme.desc: Destined to fight and die in servitude, a group of rebel gladiators plot their escape; led to freedom by ex-Roman soldier and master of combat, Spartacus, the rebels emerge on Mount Vesuvius, and a hoard of slaves grows into a rebellion.

programme.title: Mysterious Islands
programme.desc: A volcanic island unveils its dark past; some burials shed light on a powerful ancient egyptian family; marble head is discovered off a Greek island; investigating the sudden disappearance of tagged sharks.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Ancient Dead
programme.desc: The first Emperor of China, Qin Shi Huang, rests in a tomb so large that the archaeological dig could last a century; researchers discover that the oldest of the Chinchorro mummies are children.

programme.title: Nintendo 64 Quest
programme.desc: Jay races to hit a trio of stores in Windsor, Ontario, starting with Digital Oasis, hoping to knock off as many games as possible, but what will racing to the stores cost him?

programme.title: How I Got Here
programme.sub-title: Ghana: That Name That You Live
programme.desc: Doris takes her daughter, Shetin, to Ghana to learn the truth behind her royal bloodline.

programme.title: Titans of Defense
programme.desc: When militaries need support in the field, they call upon military machines designed for diverse purposes: from delivering supplies to the battlefield and defusing dangerous minefields, to recovering military vehicles and bridging harrowing gaps.

programme.title: Revolutions That Changed History
programme.desc: Destined to fight and die in servitude, a group of rebel gladiators plot their escape; led to freedom by ex-Roman soldier and master of combat, Spartacus, the rebels emerge on Mount Vesuvius, and a hoard of slaves grows into a rebellion.

programme.title: UFO: POV
programme.desc: Renowned UFO expert Chris Rutkowski investigates real unexplained encounters, combining eyewitness testimony, on-the-ground investigation, and decades of research to uncover what really happened.

programme.title: Ghosts Off Grid
programme.desc: Jordyn goes on a solo scouting mission to see if Bohemier House, located in a provincial park, merits an official investigation; when the curator Tracey and her daughter join him, messages from beyond ring in loud and clear.

programme.title: Mysterious Islands
programme.desc: A volcanic island unveils its dark past; some burials shed light on a powerful ancient egyptian family; marble head is discovered off a Greek island; investigating the sudden disappearance of tagged sharks.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Ancient Dead
programme.desc: The first Emperor of China, Qin Shi Huang, rests in a tomb so large that the archaeological dig could last a century; researchers discover that the oldest of the Chinchorro mummies are children.

programme.title: UFO: POV
programme.desc: Renowned UFO expert Chris Rutkowski investigates real unexplained encounters, combining eyewitness testimony, on-the-ground investigation, and decades of research to uncover what really happened.

programme.title: Titans of Defense
programme.desc: When militaries need support in the field, they call upon military machines designed for diverse purposes: from delivering supplies to the battlefield and defusing dangerous minefields, to recovering military vehicles and bridging harrowing gaps.

programme.title: Ghosts Off Grid
programme.desc: Jordyn goes on a solo scouting mission to see if Bohemier House, located in a provincial park, merits an official investigation; when the curator Tracey and her daughter join him, messages from beyond ring in loud and clear.

programme.title: Mysterious Islands
programme.desc: A volcanic island unveils its dark past; some burials shed light on a powerful ancient egyptian family; marble head is discovered off a Greek island; investigating the sudden disappearance of tagged sharks.

programme.title: How I Got Here
programme.sub-title: Ghana: That Name That You Live
programme.desc: Doris takes her daughter, Shetin, to Ghana to learn the truth behind her royal bloodline.

programme.title: Believe
programme.desc: From the intricacies of prayer, to the diversity of Islamic art, and the rich and beautiful traditions of Ramadan and Eid al-Fitr; exploring the vivid picture of how Islam fosters justice, and compassion, through the submission to God.

programme.title: Revolutions That Changed History
programme.desc: Destined to fight and die in servitude, a group of rebel gladiators plot their escape; led to freedom by ex-Roman soldier and master of combat, Spartacus, the rebels emerge on Mount Vesuvius, and a hoard of slaves grows into a rebellion.

programme.title: Deadly Science
programme.sub-title: Dangerous Heights (Apollo 1, Amelia Earhart, Franz Reichelt)
programme.desc: People who defy earthly forces and dream of high-flying adventures.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Science
programme.desc: Nazi dreams of an ideal city start to take shape; neighbourhoods are slated for demolition; the ideal Aryan city in Linz is designed with temples of art and culture, looted from the downtrodden; what might a Nazi city look like had Hitler succeeded.

programme.title: UFO: POV
programme.desc: Renowned UFO expert Chris Rutkowski investigates real unexplained encounters, combining eyewitness testimony, on-the-ground investigation, and decades of research to uncover what really happened.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: Archaeologists discover human remains during an excavation of a fifth-century fort on the Swedish island of Oland; after further investigation, experts unearth 26 skeletons and uncover the site of an ancient massacre.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ancient Bodies: Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: Human remains are discovered near Croghan Hill, Ireland, a significant place for ancient kings; the investigation takes a turn when authorities realize the body is not a current missing person or murder victim.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Titans of Defense
programme.desc: The age of drone warfare and autonomous defense is upon us and to carry out remote operations, drones, missiles and defense systems employ game-changing sensors, algorithms and control centres.

programme.title: Secrets of Ancient Structures
programme.desc: Humanity's quest for immortality has birthed monuments that seemingly transcend death; from the Taj Mahal's luminous marble that embodies eternal love to the crypt of Salian emperors in Germany's Speyer Cathedral to the majestic Lycian rock-cut tombs in Turkey, these edifices hold clues to how our ancestors faced death and celebrated life.

programme.title: Nintendo 64 Quest
programme.desc: Jay's confidence is shaken when he encounters an unknown expensive game that goes for a seemingly obscene price. Will he take the plunge?

programme.title: Deadly Science
programme.sub-title: Dangerous Heights (Apollo 1, Amelia Earhart, Franz Reichelt)
programme.desc: People who defy earthly forces and dream of high-flying adventures.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: Archaeologists discover human remains during an excavation of a fifth-century fort on the Swedish island of Oland; after further investigation, experts unearth 26 skeletons and uncover the site of an ancient massacre.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Science
programme.desc: Nazi dreams of an ideal city start to take shape; neighbourhoods are slated for demolition; the ideal Aryan city in Linz is designed with temples of art and culture, looted from the downtrodden; what might a Nazi city look like had Hitler succeeded.
